Herta Space Station.Body: This is Herta Space Station, home to #83 Genius Society Member, Herta. Here, you may find many exotic artifact, coming from the various corners of the universe.

Jarilo VI.Body: This is Jarilo VI, the land is cold and barren. You find little to no living organisms, rather automatons that roam the surface.

Xianzhou.Body: This is the Xianzhou. A fleet of ships that sails the cosmos in the shape of an arrow.

Penacony.Body: Penacony, the land of Dreams. This is the ideal vacation spot for all newcomers looking for a place to visit or settle!

rest.Body: A local bakery leaks a sweet aroma that encapsulates the surrounding crowd. Out on the display are these colorful cake rolls that smell like cinnamon and vanilla.

yum.Body: You take a bite out of the rolls and they taste exactly, as you imagine; like heaven on earth.

Amphoreus.Body: Amphoreus, The Eternal Land. The hospitality received from the Gods and citizens makes this journey a place to never forget!

Choices.LockedText: You may not traverse to Planarcadia yet, as a giant firewall has blocked the road!

Beyond.Body: Planarcadia, where your imagination can become a reality, really! You find yourself spending weeks upon months creating whatever, whomever you please!
